## Solar PV Executive Dashboard

This project is a comprehensive React-based dashboard for executives to monitor solar targets, compare load vs solar production, track financial metrics, and view key performance indicators.

### Key Features:
- Solar production tracking vs targets
- Load vs solar comparisons  
- Financial metrics (ROI, savings, costs)
- Key performance indicators
- Interactive charts and data visualizations
- Executive-level interface

### Development Guidelines:
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Implement responsive design
- Focus on clear data visualization
- Prioritize executive-level insights
- Include financial analysis capabilities

### Project Structure:
- Uses Vite + React + TypeScript
- Modern build tooling and hot reload
- Component-based architecture
